subparts.text: Explain the concept of 'search knowledge' in the context of AI and provide one example of its use in problem-solving.
What are intelligent agents? Describe the role of agents in the AI system architecture.
Explain the Means-End Analysis technique with an example of problem-solving in AI.
Analyze the significance of alpha-beta pruning in improving the performance of Minimax in decision-making systems.
What is a conceptual dependency graph? Demonstrate its application in representing natural language sentences.
Explain how semantic networks can be used for reasoning.
What are radial basis function networks? Explain their working and significance in AI applications.
Explain the role of activation functions in neural networks. Compare commonly used activation functions with examples.

questions.question_text: Compare informed and uninformed search strategies. Evaluate their effectiveness in solving a given problem with an example.
Explain the functionality of different types of intelligent agents. Discuss their relevance in designing autonomous systems.
Define informed search strategies and explain how heuristics influence their efficiency. Further, Explain the A* algorithm in detail.
Define constraint satisfaction problems . Solve a real-world problem using CSP techniques.
Discuss the principles of Forward Chaining and Backward Chaining within Rule-Based Systems, emphasizing their distinctions and real-world use cases.
Explain how predicate logic extends propositional logic for knowledge representation. Discuss its application in knowledge representation.
Compare single-layer perceptron with multi-layer perceptron. Explain how backpropagation improves learning.
Describe the learning paradigms in AI: supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning. Provide real-world examples for each.
